text:
There once was a little cat named Whiskers. He loved nothing more than exploring the great outdoors.

One sunny day, Whiskers decided to wander past his favourite garden. There, surrounded by beautiful flowers, he spotted a lovely little butterfly fluttering about.

Curiosity got the better of him, so Whiskers strode up to the butterfly. To his astonishment, it landed on his whiskers!

Incredibly, it didn't seem bothered. Instead, it rested its head on Whiskers' nose. He brushed it gently.

The butterfly chirped softly. Whiskers couldn't understand a single word, but its cheerful little voice warmed his heart. It seemed like a lovely companion.

For the day, Whiskers didn't want to go home. He spent hours outside, playing with his newfound friend. When night fell, they found their way back to Whiskers' cozy home.

Every night after that, Whiskers would go searching for his flutter
